title: Target Encoding with Shifted Expanding Mean for Time-Series Features
wikilinks: Copilot Session Checkpoint: Sprint 10 Implementation and Deployment
Copilot Session Checkpoint: Sprint 10 Retrain In Progress
summary: Target encoding replaces categorical variables with a statistic of the target variable, such as the mean target value for each category. For time-series data, a shifted expanding mean is used to avoid data leakage by only using past data...
